checks.name: demo decision totals
checks.details: Expected 3 requests: 1 safe internal task, 1 approval-required task, and 1 blocked task.

checks.name: DataHub metadata payload
checks.details: Expected dataset URN plus datasetProperties, schemaMetadata, ownership, and glossaryTerms aspects.

checks.name: MCP-style context reads
checks.details: Expected the agent read path to include DataHub entity, DataHub lineage, and CAT context packet reads.

checks.name: context tool contracts
checks.details: Expected machine-readable contracts for the DataHub reads, CAT context packet read, and receipt write.

checks.name: DataHub integration checklist
checks.details: Expected local evidence to be judgeable without credentials while preserving the optional local GMS post path.

checks.name: DataHub claim audit
checks.details: Expected all DataHub-specific claims to pass the generated audit.

checks.name: DataHub MCP handoff
checks.details: Expected an MCP handoff artifact that connects DataHub reads, CAT policy, and bounded receipt writes.

checks.name: safety boundary
checks.details: Expected unverified external outreach to remain blocked.

checks.name: judge pack
checks.details: Expected judge evidence pack to summarize commands, safety claims, and inspectable artifacts.

checks.name: lineage decision map
checks.details: Expected source, DataHub context reads, decision branches, and receipt routing to be mapped.

checks.name: safety policy matrix
checks.details: Expected explicit allowed, approval-required, and blocked action policies tied to the request outcomes.
